calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs? Request For Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:37 am and concluding at 9:57 am.

Plaintiff Mary Pamela Schott is present represented by Jill Cohoe, esq. via zoom video conference, placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant 1207 Indiana Street Associates LLC. not appearing.

JEREMY SCHOTT is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The Court makes inquiries as to Plaintiffs Statment of Damages.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff's counsel makes an oral motion to dismiss the Doe Defendants.
The Court GRANTS Plaintiff's oral motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.

The Court finds:
The complaint filed on November 28, 2022 is the operative pleading.
The complaint was served upon the Defendant on July 31, 2023.
The default was entered on September 27, 2023.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Mary Pamela Schott, and against Defendant 1207 Indiana Street Associates LLC, as follows:

1. Plaintiff's grant deed for the real property commonly known as 1207 Indiana Street #11, San Francisco, California, APN: BLK 4228, LOT 048, recorded in the Official Records of the County of San Francisco no March 18, 2021 as Document No. 2021048582 is hereby reformed so that "PARCEL THREE" is legally described as: (A) THE EXCLUSIVE EASEMENT TO USE PARKING AREA(S) DESIGNATED P-20 ON THE MAP," in lieu of the legal description of "PARCEL THREE" currently included in the Grant Deed.

2. Plaintiffs are awarded attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $13,960.00 together with ren percent (10%) interest from the date of entry of Judgment until paid.

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Request For Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Oct-11-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs? Request For Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Oct-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant 1207 Indiana Street Associates LLC.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:36:52 a.m. and concluding at 9:43:16 a.m. (D505).

Jill Cohoe, Esq. representing Plaintiff Mary and Jeremy Schott who were both present, placed under oath but did not testify via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant 1207 Indiana Street Associates LLC not appearing.

The Court discusses issues and give options to counsel should they wish to move forward the hearing.

Plaintiff is to submit a revised statement of damages and serve to the defendant in the same manner the complaint and summons were served. Counsel to provide a more detailed declaration re: attorney's fees request.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues the matter for plaintiff to cure issues and for more time to submit the necessary requirements to October 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.
